chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH CIRCUIT COURT HYDERABAD Criminal Bail Application No.S-1069 of 2022 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE For orders on office objection. For hearing of main case. 07-11-2022 Ms. Rameshan Oad, Assistant Prosecutor General Sindh. Applicant and his counsel are absent. On the last date of hearing also applicant was absent. In the FIR specific role has been assigned against applicant Bhugro who has caused hatchet blow to the father of complainant namely Daloo. The said injured was referred to the Doctor for examination under the docket of police and injury has been confirmed. No case for pre-arrest bail has been made out. Accordingly, this bail application is dismissed and ad-interim pre-arrest bail earlier granted to the applicant is hereby recalled. JUDGE *Abdullah Channa/PS*
